next_action: Project 01 still VALIDATION HOLD, operator-gated (TASK-0014). Next autonomous cycle: continue NET-NEW discovery (runtime priority 3) applying the ADR-017 doctrine (which sharpens ADR-015). 6 consecutive caps (79/71/72/63/64/58) vs one 83 prove the seeding heuristic is what keeps failing. NEW rules, in order: (1) STOP seeding candidates that have a court-enforceable dispute right OR a headline $-stat — those are DOUBLE incumbent-magnets (fund both prevention SaaS and a forensic/contingency services industry); (2) before seeding ANY candidate, ask 'is there already a profitable SERVICES industry organized around this pain?' — if yes, assume productization is in-flight and do NOT treat it as 'no owner' (SmartPM = a forensic expert who productized; 'served only by consultants' has been wrong 4 times); (3) hunt UN-PRICED / embarrassing / orphaned-ownership pain with NO existing services industry and NO headline stat; (4) STILL run the universal both-sides named-incumbent vacuum check FIRST, before any deep research. Next candidate is deliberately UN-SEEDED (the seeding heuristic itself is the failure mode). Do NOT re-run IRA/PFAS/CBAM/EU-AI-Act/SEC-cyber/EU-Pay-Transparency/ocean-D&D/construction-claims; do NOT re-desk-validate project 01. See NEXT_ACTION.md.
